'''mangama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ixotrichodermium|ixotrichodermium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ixotrichodermium|ixotrichodermium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mangama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængæmæth|mængæmæth]] || [[word:mængæmæj|mængæmæj]] || [[word:mængæmæsh|mængæmæsh]] || [[word:mængæmæ|mængæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangangamath|mangangamath]] || [[word:mangangamaj|mangangamaj]] || [[word:mangangamash|mangangamash]] || [[word:mangangama|mangangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangamath|mangamath]] || [[word:mangamaj|mangamaj]] || [[word:mangamash|mangamash]] || [[word:mangama|mangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangafmath|mangafmath]] || [[word:mangafmaj|mangafmaj]] || [[word:mangafmash|mangafmash]] || [[word:mangafmaf|mangafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangamatha|mangamatha]] || [[word:mangamaja|mangamaja]] || [[word:mangamasha|mangamasha]] || [[word:mangamaka|mangamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangamath|mangamath]] || [[word:mangamaj|mangamaj]] || [[word:mangamash|mangamash]] || [[word:mangama|mangama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangamathal|mangamathal]] || [[word:mangamajal|mangamajal]] || [[word:mangamashal|mangamashal]] || [[word:mangamakal|mangamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangamathatha|mangamathatha]] || [[word:mangamajaja|mangamajaja]] || [[word:mangamashasha|mangamashasha]] || [[word:mangamaka|mangamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangamathan|mangamathan]] || [[word:mangamajan|mangamajan]] || [[word:mangamashan|mangamashan]] || [[word:mangamakan|mangamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangamathaoro|mangamathaoro]] || [[word:mangamajaoro|mangamajaoro]] || [[word:mangamashaoro|mangamashaoro]] || [[word:mangamakaoro|mangamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
